summary: Applied PG migration fixes C+F to packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts. fix-C: Wired skipMigrations flag via module-level shouldSkipMigrations() helper, gating both makeLocalPgAdapter and makePgAdapter migration paths. fix-F: Renamed SQLiteTransactionOptions → LocalTransactionOptions with _tag: "pglite", added deprecated alias for backward compat, updated TransactionOptions union and _tag discriminator check. Typecheck: exit 2 (baseline unchanged), zero adapter.ts errors.
